name: Braverman Files Unleashed: Every Secret Now Exposed
message: Handala Hack | Bibi Gate: The Truth Denied, The Evidence Unfolds Once again, as expected, the Prime Minister’s Office of the Zionist regime rushes to deny what can no longer be hidden. They claim, as always, that the hack of Tzachi Braverman, Netanyahu’s Chief of Staff, the gatekeeper, the vault of secrets, is nothing but…
